ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  "delete_no" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the project has been marked for deletion */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred during the project */,
  "client" TEXT /* Name or ID of the client */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence" (
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of correspondence */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project to which the correspondence belongs */,
  "correspondence_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of correspondence (e.g., Email, Memo, Task Assignment) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the correspondence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondence was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the correspondence */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondence was last updated */,
  "delete_no" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the correspondence has been marked for deletion */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the correspondence (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "urgency" TEXT /* Urgency of the correspondence (e.g., Immediate, Normal, Low) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the correspondence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_correspondence_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_type_id") REFERENCES correspondence_types ("correspondence_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_types" (
  "correspondence_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of correspondence */,
  "correspondence_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the correspondence type */,
  "correspondence_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the correspondence type */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the correspondence type is external */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondence_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, Team Member, Auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "delete_no" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account has been marked for deletion */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_details" (
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of correspondence */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the correspondence */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content or body of the correspondence */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* File path to any attachments */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* List of recipients (To) */,
  "sent_cc" TEXT /* List of recipients (CC) */,
  "sent_bcc" TEXT /* List of recipients (BCC) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the correspondence (e.g., Draft, Sent, Received) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the correspondence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondence was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the correspondence */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the correspondence was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the correspondence */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent correspondence (if this is a reply or update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_details_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_details_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project member */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the user started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the user ended working on the project */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the project membership record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project membership record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the project membership record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project membership record was last updated */,
  "delete_no" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the project membership record has been marked for deletion */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Total time spent by the user on the project */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Last activity date of the user in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correspondence */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field after the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the correspondence at the time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_history_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correspondence the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the attachment was uploaded */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the attachment is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_attachments_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correspondence_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "correspondence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the correspondence the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_comments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_comments_correspondence_id FOREIGN KEY ("correspondence_id") REFERENCES correspondence ("correspondence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correspondence_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
